features: S5341 JCB 9V Super Alkaline Batteries - Pack of 1
description: Product Description JCB Industrial JCB is offered to commercial or industrial users at a fraction of the cost of the consumer packed JCB equivalent. They offer the same great performance as JCB batteries but are packed in bulk. JCB Alkaline JCB batteries combine great build quality with excellent value for money. AA batteries are most commonly used for remote controls, computer accessories, torches, etc. JCB Rechargeable JCB rechargeable batteries come pre-charged and ready to use straight out of the packet. Providing long lasting energy with up to 500 charges.
